extraction.one_line_summary: CARAPAZ Richard attacked 3km from summit finish, distanced ROGLIC when Caruso's pace ended, gained only 4 seconds but took maglia rosa
tactical_patterns: Mitchelton-Scott placed two riders in break forcing Roglic to police without teammates, isolating him immediately on climb one.
Astana dual-pronged: two break riders plus Lopez attacking favorites group diluted chasing resources across multiple threats simultaneously.
Carapaz timed his winning move exactly when Caruso exhausted himself closing Lopez gap, exploiting momentary hesitation before Roglic could react.
Nibali attacked corners on first climb kilometer knowing Roglic isolated, testing GC leader without teammates before sustained climbing began.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: looked struggling initially but bridged intelligently when favorites watched each other, recovering 1:30+ from bad previous day
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: completely isolated with 4.5 climbs remaining, forced to personally police every Lopez attack without any Jumbo support
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: mechanical at worst moment as Lopez attacked, lost contact with favorites group during crucial early selection
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: launched repeated accelerations as best young rider forcing Roglic to close every gap personally, softening him for Carapaz
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: neutral: attacked aggressively early on corners with brother Antonio's leadout but gained only bonus seconds at finish
rider_signals.POLANC Jan: negative: hanging tough at back early in climb but fell away dramatically when decisive moves came
